---
title: "Earth Observing Lab"
subtitle: "Remote sensing + climate-focused science and tools"
image: assets/img/lab-mark.png
---

Welcome! We build and apply Earth observation methods to understand and reduce greenhouse gas emissions and improve climate decision-making.

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="project-card">
<img src="assets/img/projects/project-example.jpg" alt="Project image">
<h3><a href="research/projects/project-example/">Featured Project: Methane Plumes</a></h3>
<p class="muted">Detecting and attributing methane point sources using satellite data.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="assets/img/people/jane-doe.jpg" alt="Person image">
<h3><a href="people/">Meet the Lab</a></h3>
<p class="muted">Students, staff, collaborators, and alumni.</p>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<img src="assets/img/lab-mark.png" alt="Blog image">
<h3><a href="blog/">Lab Blog / News</a></h3>
<p class="muted">Short posts on new papers, releases, talks, and field work.</p>
</div>

</div>

## What we do
- Satellite and airborne retrievals (CO₂ / CH₄ and related tracers)
- Inversion and attribution methods
- Open-source tools and reproducible workflows
- Partnerships with science and mitigation communities

## Get involved
Interested in joining? See **[Join](join.qmd)** or email us via **[Contact](contact.qmd)**.
